title: Add ability to search for an exact text match in the search box
excerpt:

posts.author: apilolli (Apryl)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love to have the ability to search for an exact text spring in the Board search box.

Currently if you search for items with the date Feb 6 the search brings back items with the date Feb 6 and Feb 16. And adding quote marks around the phrase to specify that you only want Feb 6 doesn’t work.

Screenshot 2023-02-03 at 3.45.26 PM1369×516 122 KB

posts.author: JLovell (Joe)
posts.cookedHtml: I think Monday.com has the only search functionality of any app I’ve used in the last 15 years that doesn’t have this feature. It’s really important for users with a lot of data in their accounts.
